bullets: Re-architected the Core Logistics System by consolidating three legacy modules in the Delivery Order process, reducing database complexity by over 50% and improving performance and maintainability.
Built a new textile production tracking module for 200+ staff; automated conversion of Sales Orders to Production Orders in one click, halving manual entry and calculations.
Designed and implemented sales and quotation modules with pricing compliance and approval workflows to ensure data integrity while supporting flexible business rules.

Rapidly delivered a stock opname (inventory audit) system with web and mobile apps in under a week, from database design to deployment, ensuring full synchronization between physical inventory and the database.
Provided continuous monitoring and maintenance for one month to ensure high server uptime and consistent performance.
Achieved 100% data recovery with regular backups across two websites.
Managed servers and databases; executed a seamless migration of the entire web presence with zero user disruption.
Analyzed and optimized a key workflow on the main website to improve load times by ~25%, increasing user satisfaction and engagement.
Launched a 4‑step newspaper ad booking process with integrated payment, enabling online reservations and saving clients time; delivered Digital Iklan Radar Banjarmasin.
Implemented a 3‑step e‑newspaper purchase flow with a single QR payment, replacing phone-based processes; built an intuitive app for Digital Radar Banjarmasin.
Enabled 10 payment methods for e‑newspaper and ad space purchases, increasing flexibility and convenience.
Architected and launched two new web applications (ad booking and e‑newspaper sales), moving manual phone-based operations fully online.
